[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00100010 2
1 00010000 1
2 00011000 2
3 10000110 3
4 00010000 1
5 00000010 1
6 10000000 1
7 00010001 2

12 21 00000000 a

70 07 00000000 a
